text: Hi, my name is Megan and I'm with AutoCare. Basically, I would like to ask you to open your auto insurance. I want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? I understand. I'm not trying to make any changes right now. I just need to verify one quick detail so I can update the information correctly. Just to confirm really quick, are you under the age of 80?
